Q4 Product Roadmap Deck: The Q4 2023 roadmap focuses on three strategic themes: platform reliability, enterprise readiness, and AI-powered features. The top three initiatives by engineering investment are the single sign-on (SSO) integration for enterprise customers (8 weeks), the advanced search and filtering overhaul (6 weeks), and the AI-assisted content summarization feature (4 weeks). All initiatives have been sized, prioritized by customer impact and revenue potential, and mapped to specific engineering squads. The roadmap will be presented to the board on October 3 and communicated to customers via a public-facing changelog post.
